name: Heromantic
short_description: Play a steely reporter or a rookie heroine, and brave your way through deadly secrets, evil plots, and extraordinary encounters in this superhero visual novel! Will you stand strong in what you believe... and protect your heart in the process?
detailed_description:
Trouble in Union City!

When the city is shaken by its latest threat, a steely reporter and fresh-faced heroine find themselves faced with opportunities that will shape their futures forever... Explore the facets of a world with superheroes and uncover the hearts hidden beneath the masks in this parodical yet dramatic visual novel!

Two Walks of Life

Play the reporter Beverly Boulevard to write the biggest scoop in journalism and finally earn some recognition, or play the hero Luminary to uncover the meaning behind strange occurrences in the city while working with the best team around: the Super Troupe! Whose life will you live?

Features
- 2 Playable Protagonists
- 2 Main Romantic Interests per Protagonist
- 20+ Endings
- 20+ Unique Sprites
- 38 CG Illustrations
- Original Soundtrack
- 40,000+ Words
